Video.summary: Emeril's in the kitchen to help you bring the best breakfast to the table. Plus, recipes: Kicked-Up Coffee, Fluffy Biscuits with Sausage Gravy, and more.
Video.title: Entertaining with Emeril

Video.summary: Emeril shares some of his favorite mushroom recipes.
Video.title: Wild Mushrooms

Video.summary: Emeril's Restaurant in New Orleans recipes.
Video.title: Emeril's Restaurant Classics

Video.summary: Emeril offers some delicious meatless entrees: udon noodle stir-fry with crunchy vegetables, hearty kale and chickpea stew, and eggplant and squash lasagna
Video.title: Vegetarian Main Courses

Video.summary: Add Italian flair to your next dinner with Emeril's favorites.
Video.title: Italian Favorites

Video.summary: Emeril and his friend Gabrielle Deculus celebrate creole culinary culture.
Video.title: with Gabrielle Deculus

Video.summary: For your next get together, host a dinner the New Orleans way!
Video.title: Crawfish Celebration

Video.summary: Emeril and Voodoo priestesses Brandi and Maggie celebrate New Orleans' annual Voodoo Fest.
Video.title: with Mambo Brandi, Mambo Maggie

Video.summary: Emeril shares the tale of two Louisiana surfers who stumbled on the perfect seaside snack: sea beans!
Video.title: A Surfer's Discovery: Sea Beans

Video.summary: Emeril spotlights Louisiana hot sauce and turns up the heat on Piri Piri Shrimp and Wings with Pimenta Moida Sauce.
Video.title: No Pain, No Gain: Louisiana Hot Sauce

Image.alt: No Pain, No Gain: Louisiana Hot Sauce
No Pain, No Gain: Louisiana Hot Sauce
No Pain, No Gain: Louisiana Hot Sauce

Video.summary: For your next get together, make Louisiana bourbon the star ingredient.
Video.title: Louisiana Bourbon

Video.summary: For your next get together, try Emeril's favorite beef recipes with an international twist!
Video.title: Why Grass-Fed Beef?

Video.summary: Inspired by saffron grown right here in the states, Emeril serves up his famous lobster with pappardelle and saffron cream sauce, seafood paella, and saffron olive oil cake.
Video.title: Saffron from the South

Video.summary: For your next tailgate, let Los Angeles' Asian flavors inspire you.
Video.title: Los Angeles Chargers

Video.summary: Emeril and dairy farm owner Sarah Roland create dishes using buffalo mozzarella.
Video.title: with Sarah Roland

Video.summary: For a New York style tailgate, keep it old school with Emeril's favorite deli inspired classics.
Video.title: New York Giants

Video.summary: Win over everyone with Emeril's easy crab dishes.
Video.title: Baltimore Ravens

Video.summary: For a Cincinnati style tailgate, Emeril's Ohio favorites will make you the MVP of any party.
Video.title: Cincinnati Bengals

Video.summary: Steak au Poivre, Flambeed Tangerines
Video.title: Flambe

Video.summary: The best strawberries come from Louisiana, and here are some of Emeril's favorite berry recipes.
Video.title: Strawberry Festival

Video.summary: For your next get together, punch up the menu with Emeril's coffee-inspired recipes!
Video.title: New Orleans Coffee

Video.summary: For your next get together, celebrate the creole tomato with some of Emeril's favorite dishes.
Video.title: What's a Creole Tomato?

Video.title: Talking About Flour

Video.title: Portuguese Memories

Video.summary: Basic Tamales, Spicy Duck Tamales, Chicken and Corn Tamales
Video.title: Tamales

Video.summary: Goat Cheese, Goat Cheese and Spinach Tart
Video.title: Cheeses

Video.title: Legumes

Video.title: Risotto

Video.summary: For the next tailgate, take a cue from Emeril's home team the New Orleans Saints; Creole glazed turkey wings and poor man's french fry po' boy sandwich.
Video.title: New Orleans Saints

Video.summary: Any time of year is a great time for a cookout! Join Emeril for grilled rack of lamb with mixed-herb pesto and a side of grilled potatoes with feta
Video.title: Grill It Up!
